autoKnowledgeEngine.path: Supabase REST (service role) for data; PostgreSQL via resolveDatabaseUrl() for migrations/RPC
autoKnowledgeEngine.note: AKE cron does NOT use a separate DB URL — same DATABASE_URL as all server-side pg clients
